Bash(python -c "
from database import engine
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
import models

with Session\(engine\) as db:
    tracks = db.query\(models.Track.title, models.Track.artist, models.Track.genre\).all\(\)
    for t in tracks:
        print\(f'{t.title} | {t.artist} | Genre: {t.genre}'\)
")

Bash(python -c "
from database import engine
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
import models, os

with Session\(engine\) as db:
    tracks = db.query\(models.Track\).all\(\)
    total = 0
    for t in tracks:
        size = t.file_size or \(os.path.getsize\(t.file_path\) if t.file_path and os.path.isfile\(t.file_path\) else 0\)
        total += size
        print\(f'{t.title[:40]:<40} | {size/1024/1024:.1f} MB'\)
    print\(f'\\nTotal: {total/1024/1024:.1f} MB across {len\(tracks\)} tracks'\)
")
